emails.body: 980432 Daren, Can you please see if you can roll deal 156657 for day 1 for April? This deal expired 3/2000. There was no new deal referenced nor was the evergreen flag applied. This meter flowed 556 MMBTU's on April 1, 2000. Thanks -Jackie- 3-94987
